answers: We are building a relationship-intelligence tool for founder-led companies.
It is for founders who need clearer story, investor readiness, and better relationship routing.
The painful problem is that good products often get ignored because the story is hard to repeat.
The timing matters because AI makes story iteration faster but also creates more generic pitches.
The team has direct founder, investor, and AI product-building experience.
Early proof includes live West Peek deal flow, current founder tooling, and working Network OS integration.
We need strategic founders, investor feedback, and useful introductions.
